seo.title: Print on Demand | Quarterfold Printabilities
seo.description: Build your book online: pick format, size, paper, binding and finish. From a single copy to a short run, printed to our millions-scale standard.

hero.title: Your Book. Exactly as You Imagined.
hero.sub: From a single copy to a short run, printed to the same standard as our millions. Choose how your book looks and feels, and we’ll turn your files into finished copies you’ll be proud to hold.

build.title: Build your book
build.lede: Make each choice below. The preview and your spec sheet update as you go. No prices, no commitment, just the book you have in mind.

format.title: Format
format.help: How the book is bound and held.

paper.title: Paper
paper.help: How the pages feel in the hand.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.help: One copy or a short run.

proof.name: Free digital proof
proof.desc: See a colour-accurate proof and sign off before we print a single page.

check.name: Hand quality check
check.desc: Every copy is inspected for colour, trim and binding by a real person.

packing.name: Secure packing
packing.desc: Books are wrapped to arrive crisp: no dinged corners, no scuffs.

delivery.name: Doorstep delivery
delivery.desc: Tracked shipping to your door, whether it is one book or five hundred.

summary.title: This book
summary.note: No prices, no obligation. We’ll send a tailored quote and a free proof. Prefer to talk it through? <link>Speak to us.</link>

upload.name: Upload
upload.desc: Send your print-ready files, or your manuscript and cover. We check them for you.

approve.name: Approve Proof
approve.desc: We send a colour-accurate proof. Nothing prints until you are happy with it.

ship.name: We Print & Ship
ship.desc: Your book runs on the same presses as our millions, then ships to your door.

band.quote: One book gets the same presses as one million.
band.sub: There is no “small order” shortcut here. Whether you print a single proof or a full run, your book moves through the same colour-managed presses and the same hands that produce our millions of books a year.
band.stat2Label: Books a year on the same presses

cta.title: Not sure yet? Order a sample first.
cta.sub: Hold the paper, check the colour, feel the binding, then decide. Tell us what you’re making and we’ll help you get a single sample copy into your hands.
